'''Tino''' was the flatmate of [[Ren S'orn]]. While he was working in a warehouse, the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ona Nobis]] attempted to kill him, but the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Astri Oddo]] were able to save him. Once the situation had calmed down, he gave them information on how to find [[Jenna Zan Arbor]] and [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]].
